title.en: Yom Kippur: The Holiest Day of the Year
title.zh: 赎罪日：一年中最神圣的日子
title.he: יום כיפור: היום הקדוש ביותר בשנה

description: A complete guide to the Day of Atonement — the five prohibitions, Kol Nidrei, vidui (confession), and the Ne'ilah closing prayer.
author: Torah Light Editorial Team
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior Jewish knowledge
